files.patch:
@@ -6,5 +6,8 @@ ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
 
 cd "$ROOT"
 
-echo "Rebuilding and running tmuxwatch with cache disabled..."
-exec env GOCACHE=off go run ./cmd/tmuxwatch "$@"
+echo "Cleaning build cache..."
+go clean -cache
+
+echo "Rebuilding and running tmuxwatch..."
+exec go run ./cmd/tmuxwatch "$@"
